title: awsec2/create-vm input
description: Input Contract for the awsec2/create-vm Action (charter §2.2 headline example, ADR-0031). AWS credentials inject as a CredentialRef (§2.5), not params.

endpoint.description: override API endpoint (dev: the moto stand-in)

projectKind.description: estate overlay (ADR-0058 §6): the Entity kind the built instance projects AS (e.g. host), so a fleet View selects it. Empty keeps the native 'instance'.

projectLabels.description: estate overlay labels carried on the built instance's Run-provenance projection — the stratt.intent/instance correlation key + fleet labels the Run may own (§2.1 per-key ownership).
